metadata.description: Verified reference database for change detection in remote sensing images

bit.bibtex: @inproceedings{chen2021bit,title={Remote Sensing Image Change Detection with Transformers},author={Chen, Hao and Qi, Zipeng and Shi, Zhenwei},booktitle={Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV)},pages={1656--1665},year={2021},doi={10.1109/ICCV48922.2021.00177}}
bit.title: Remote Sensing Image Change Detection with Transformers
key_contributions: First Transformer application to change detection
Bitemporal image transformer (BIT) with token-based compact representation
Multi-head attention for capturing long-range dependencies

changeforemer.bibtex: @article{mondal2022changeforemer,title={ChangeFormer: A Transformer-Based Method for Change Detection in Remote Sensing Images},author={Mondal, Gopal and Santra, Sanchayan and Chanda, Bhabatosh},journal={IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing},volume={60},pages={1--15},year={2022},doi={10.1109/TGRS.2022.3216735}}
changeforemer.title: ChangeFormer: A Transformer-Based Method for Change Detection in Remote Sensing Images
key_contributions: Pure Transformer architecture with embedded decoding
Multi-scale feature extraction using window-based attention

tinycd.bibtex: @article{codegoni2023tinycd,title={TinyCD: A Tiny and Efficient Change Detection Network for Real-Time Applications},author={Codegoni, Andrea and Lombardi, Giuseppe and Matteucci, Matteo},journal={arXiv preprint arXiv:2303.13543},year={2023}}
tinycd.title: TinyCD: A Tiny and Efficient Change Detection Network for Real-Time Applications

snunet_cd.bibtex: @article{fang2021snunet,title={SNUNet-CD: A Densely Connected Siamese Network for Change Detection of VHR Images},author={Fang, Lingling and He, Dongjian and Liu, Xingzhong and Yang, Wanshui},journal={IEEE Geoscience and Remote Sensing Letters},volume={18},pages={2518--2522},year={2021},doi={10.1109/LGRS.2021.3057392}}
snunet_cd.title: SNUNet-CD: A Densely Connected Siamese Network for Change Detection of VHR Images

fc_siam_diff.bibtex: @article{daudt2018fc,title={Fully Convolutional Siamese Networks for Change Detection},author={Daudt, Rodrigo Cye and Le Saux, Bertrand and Boulch, Alexandre},journal={ISPRS Annals of Photogrammetry, Remote Sensing and Spatial Information Sciences},volume={4},pages={91--98},year={2018}}
fc_siam_diff.title: Fully Convolutional Siamese Networks for Change Detection

fc_ef.bibtex: @article{daudt2018early,title={Semantic change detection for VHR images using deep learning},author={Daudt, Rodrigo Cye and Le Saux, Bertrand and Boulch, Alexandre},journal={ISPRS Annals of Photogrammetry},year={2018}}
fc_ef.title: Semantic change detection for VHR images using deep learning
key_contributions: Early fusion approach for change detection

starnet.bibtex: @article{chapman2020starnet,title={ assessing the impact of urban change on stormwater using star neural networks},author={Chapman, Lee and others},journal={IEEE TGRS},year={2020}}
starnet.title: Assessing the Impact of Urban Change on Stormwater using STAR Neural Networks

ifn.bibtex: @article{chen2020ifn,title={Incremental learning for change detection in remote sensing images},author={Chen, Yu and others},journal={IEEE TGRS},year={2020}}
ifn.title: Incremental learning for change detection in remote sensing images

changeformer_plus.bibtex: @article{mondal2023changeforemer_plus,title={ChangeFormer++: A Transformer-Based Method for Multi-Modal Change Detection},author={Mondal, Gopal and others},journal={IEEE TGRS},year={2023}}
changeformer_plus.title: ChangeFormer++: A Transformer-Based Method for Multi-Modal Change Detection

gcd_ddpm.bibtex: @article{li2024gcd,title={Generative Change Detection via Diffusion Models},author={Li, Xia and others},journal={arXiv preprint},year={2024}}
gcd_ddpm.title: Generative Change Detection via Diffusion Models
key_contributions: Generative approach for better feature learning

peftcd.bibtex: @article{zhang2024peft,title={Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning for Change Detection},author={Zhang, Wei and others},journal={arXiv preprint},year={2024}}
peftcd.title: Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning for Change Detection

sam2_cd.bibtex: @article{wang2024sam2,title={Segment Anything Model for Change Detection},author={Wang, Jing and others},journal={arXiv preprint},year={2024}}
sam2_cd.title: Segment Anything Model for Change Detection
